message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'xas_advance' sets signal field 'xa_state.xa_offset', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=xa_state;field=xa_offset;offset=18] [oracle:assert=xa_state.xa_offset stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets xa_offset without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
